Welcome to jwnhy's Blog

jwnhy

Who am I?

I am Hongyi Lu (jwnhy), a Computer Science Ph.D student in SUSTech-HKUST joint program, under the supervision of Prof. Shuai Wang and Prof. Fengwei Zhang.

Here is my resume.

What interests me?

  • C00l stuff
  • Reverse engineering
  • System Security
  • Software Engineering

What have I done? (non-selected publications)

  • DTD: Comprehensive and Scalable Testing for Debuggers (FSE 2024)
  • RingGuard: Guard io_uring with eBPF (SIGCOMM eBPF 2023)
  • Raven: A Novel Kernel Debugging Tool on RISC-V (DAC 2022)
  • Revisiting BadUSB with Type-C (WOOT 2021) with CVE-2021-22325
  • A Novel Memory Management for RISC-V Enclaves (HASP 2021)
  • A Video to ASCII Player (for fun)

And some community works.

  • Pornhub Community Translator
  • Software Foundation Translator
  • LLVM Contributor

Reject/Accept Timeline

FSE 2024 Accept 1. ASPLOS 2024 Reject
2. SIGMETRIC 2024 Reject
3. FSE 2024 Accept
Ongoing... 1. USENIX Security 2023 R2 Reject
2. S&P 2024 R2 Reject
